response.justification: Bogdan brings over 30 years of full-stack engineering experience with direct coverage of the primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS. His current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly satisfying the AI agent development requirement. A strong testing culture is evidenced through practice, framework authorship, and community workshops. The main gaps are NestJS (not mentioned despite being the core backend framework), and explicit Kotlin and Python proficiency, both listed as required — these prevent a higher score but are not disqualifying given the overall engineering depth.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple production roles, matching the primary stack directly
Current hands-on AI agent development work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure
Deeply embedded testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, authoring D-language testing frameworks, and delivering testing workshops
concerns: NestJS is entirely absent from the resume despite being the primary backend framework for the role
Kotlin and Python — both listed as required proficiencies — are not referenced in skills or employment history
Vitest and Playwright are not mentioned; modern JS testing framework familiarity is assumed but not confirmed
